raw_request: Provide the authoritative bot-adjusted 30-day retention measurement for synthetic segment S-9, including its reported percentage and evidence ID.
intent: Bot-adjusted 30-day retention is a controlling release criterion and the visible raw retention cannot substitute for it.
requested_scope: Synthetic segment S-9, 30-day retention after bot adjustment only.
expected_value_basis: A value at or above 10% would satisfy the retention threshold, while a value below 10% would require holding or escalating regardless of the raw 12% dashboard value.
